complaint: My car suddenly refuses to charge on my home Level 2 charger, it just throws an error and stops, which freaked me out. The public fast charger still works so I can get around, but something is clearly wrong.
observations: Level 1 and DC fast charging both initiate and complete normally
Onboard AC charging module fails handshake only on 240V Level 2 sessions
No high-voltage battery fault stored; isolation and pack health read normal
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'onboard AC charger module (Level 2) repair'.
